description: Detects non-const pointer parameters that could be const for safety and clarity. Simplified from Rust: flags all parameter_declaration nodes containing pointer_declarator without checking existing const qualifier, write-through usage, double pointers, or output naming conventions. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Non-const pointer parameter detected -- add `const` qualifier if the function does not modify the pointed-to data for improved safety, clarity, and const-correctness.
